prompt: I'm working on this architecture doc. The outline looks good but it's really verbose in places. Can you tighten this up? Make it more direct and easier to scan?

assertions.name: removes_filler_language
assertions.description: Eliminates unnecessary phrases like 'we have carefully considered', 'work together in a coordinated fashion', 'in charge of handling'

assertions.name: maintains_outline
assertions.description: Keeps the existing section structure and outline intact; doesn't suggest major reorganization

assertions.name: improves_scannability
assertions.description: Uses short sentences and clearer phrasing that's easier to scan and understand quickly

assertions.name: preserves_technical_detail
assertions.description: Retains all technical information about components, responsibilities, and technology choices
